commit_message:
Fixes for generic rtl. Fixes for generic rtl. Two commits:

- Simplify RESET logic in the microcode.

  Instead of setting the microcode output on reset, mask the address and define the reset output as part of the actual microcode.

  This simplifies the synthesis and allows the Yosys+ice40 tools to infer a block-ram for the module.

- Define adjl and adjl as wires.

  This avoids a warning from Yosys.
